notes: v332 — FASTER: GRADING EVERY SIGNAL NO LONGER FREEZES THE APP. You said all copies felt slow — this fixes the big one. Opening your 📋 Signal report card (and the bot's first scan of the day) used to re-grade every flag across the whole market in one burst — about a second on a large list, longer on a phone, sometimes long enough that the browser warned the page was unresponsive. Now that grade runs in tiny background slices, so the screen never locks up while it works, and it quietly pre-computes the moment your data finishes loading — so in normal use the report card and the bot open instantly. Nothing about the grading maths changed (it was checked number-for-number against the old version) — it just doesn't freeze anymore. ALSO RECENT — v331 — ANNOUNCEMENTS NO LONGER GET STUCK ON “NONE”. A tester saw one copy show a share's real ASX filings while another said “no recent announcements” for the very same share. The announcements come through free public relays, and when one briefly rate-limited or errored, the app read that as “zero announcements” and remembered it for the day. Now a bad relay response is ignored — the app tries the next relay, or shows “couldn't reach” and recovers on the next open — instead of caching a fake “none”. And the 🤖 AI deep-dive now reads the share's real recent announcements, so its review factors in the actual filings, not just the price-and-volume estimates. ALSO RECENT — v330 — FIXED THE EXPLANATION POPUP HIDING BEHIND THE CARD, so hovering a flag, number, badge, verdict or ladder rung always shows its explanation on top. ALSO RECENT — v329 — IN TRAINING MODE, HOVER ANYTHING ON THE REPORT CARD TO LEARN IT: every flag name, verdict and section header now explains itself, and in training mode the app's own clear pop-up card shows instead of the plain browser tooltip. ALSO RECENT — v328 — FIXED A FREEZE WHEN OPENING THE BOT SETTINGS (it was quietly re-running the whole signal grade just to draw one line; now it only reads a grade that's already done). (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
